name: American Express SmartEarn Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 10 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 50 spent on select 10X merchants
5 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 50 spent on select 5X merchants
1 Membership Rewards Point / Rs 50 spent on other eligible spends

exclusions: accelerated reward caps apply as per American Express terms
excluded spends as per American Express terms
milestoneBenefits: Amazon vouchers worth Rs 500 on reaching spends of Rs 1.20 lakh, Rs 1.80 lakh and Rs 2.40 lakh respectively in a cardmembership year
Renewal fee waiver on eligible spends of Rs 40,000 and above in the previous cardmembership year
additionalBenefits: Rs 500 cashback as welcome gift on eligible spends of Rs 10,000 in first 90 days
10X Membership Rewards points on participating merchants such as Zomato, Ajio, Nykaa, BookMyShow, Uber and more
5X Membership Rewards points on Amazon and other listed merchants
EMI conversion option at point of sale

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 Membership Rewards point → 1 Marriott Bonvoy point · up to Rs 1/point

salaried: Eligibility is subject to American Express approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to American Express approval criteria
